description: Detect transitions in vehicle ignition state by comparing the ignition attribute between consecutive position records, and emit ignition-on and ignition-off events to drive engine hours calculation...

actors.name: Position Processing Pipeline
actors.description: Reads the ignition attribute from incoming positions and compares with the previous value

actors.name: GPS Device
actors.description: Reports ignition state as part of each position transmission

fields.name: device_id
fields.label: Device whose ignition state is being tracked

fields.name: ignition
fields.label: Current ignition state reported in the position attributes (true = on, false = off)

fields.name: previous_ignition
fields.label: Ignition state from the device's previous position, used for transition detection

event_emission.ignition_on_transition: An ignition-on event is generated only when the previous position had ignition = false and the current position has ignition = true
event_emission.ignition_off_transition: An ignition-off event is generated only when the previous position had ignition = true and the current position has ignition = false

validation.attribute_required: If either the current or previous position lacks the ignition attribute, no ignition event is generated for that position
validation.latest_position_only: Only the latest position for the device is evaluated; outdated positions do not trigger ignition events

processing.downstream_usage: The ignition state is used by the engine hours handler to accumulate running time, and by the motion handler to inform trip detection

given: both current and previous positions carry the ignition attribute

then.description: Ignition-on event recorded with type = ignition_on, device_id, position_id

ignition_turned_on.result: Ignition-on event stored; engine hours accumulation resumes, trip detection may trigger

given: both current and previous positions carry the ignition attribute

then.description: Ignition-off event recorded with type = ignition_off, device_id, position_id

ignition_turned_off.result: Ignition-off event stored; engine hours accumulation pauses, trip segmentation may close the current trip

given: the incoming position does not include an ignition attribute
no_ignition_attribute.result: No ignition event is generated; engine hours and trip detection fall back to motion-based signals

errors.message: The device referenced in the position record does not exist

events.name: device.ignition_on
events.description: Vehicle ignition has been switched on

events.name: device.ignition_off
events.description: Vehicle ignition has been switched off

related.reason: Ignition state is read from the position attributes produced during ingestion
Engine hours are accumulated while ignition is on
Ignition transitions can serve as alternative trip start/end signals
